case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. NICOLE VERMILLION et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERMILLION, NICOLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2 SANTOS STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
